name: ExtensionInventoryItem_ProductReference
title: R5: Link to a product resource used in clinical workflows (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `InventoryItem.productReference` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`InventoryItem.productReference` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionProduct,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BiologicallyDerivedProduct)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `InventoryItem.productReference` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionProduct,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/BiologicallyDerivedProduct)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `InventoryItem.productReference` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `InventoryItem` is not mapped.
Element `InventoryItem.productReference` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
